name: Les Constructeurs du Bois S.A.
summary: Les Constructeurs Du Bois designs and constructs office, industrial, and residential buildings in France. The company develops timber real estate projects in the Grand Est. It focuses on two segments, Medical Homes and Senior Residences. The company designs and manages wood buildings. Les Constructeurs Du Bois was founded in 2010 and is based in Epinal, France.
